nav.footerText: Espace - SaaS platform for condominium associations in Moldova.

hero.title: Condominium management, simplified.
hero.subtitle: Payments, debts, issues, announcements and reports in one platform.

items.excel: Multiple Excel files for each building or administrator.
items.chaos: Call and message chaos around debts and issues.
items.transparency: Lack of transparency for committee and residents.
items.timeWaste: Time lost with manual calculations and unclear situations.

solution.title: Espace Condo solution
solution.text: A modern SaaS platform for condominium associations in Moldova, with digital workflows for administration, collections, communication and reporting.

apartments.title: Apartment registry
apartments.text: Complete structure by building, staircase and apartment with up-to-date resident data.

payments.title: Payments and debts
payments.text: Track balances, collections and arrears in one place, without Excel.

notifications.title: Automated notifications
notifications.text: Send reminders for debts and important communications to residents.

issues.title: Issues
issues.text: Residents submit issues while admins track status to resolution.

votes.title: Voting
votes.text: Run transparent voting and assemblies with centralized history.

reports.title: Reports
reports.text: Clear reports for committee, auditor and residents, ready to export.

portal.title: Resident portal
portal.text: Each resident sees invoices, payments, announcements and issue status.

items.custom: Custom pricing depending on association size.
items.models: Billing models: per apartment / per m2 / fixed fee.
